reviews.review_title: it was kinda good but i mean
reviews.review_description: it was satisfying and i love the noises cuz it's satisfying  that's all

reviews.review_title: Give me my dang money back
reviews.review_description:
It's just shovelware get's boring after 20 minutes there
's barely anything to do good idea but worst execution worst than gun world vr
accidentally put hands in shredder and now it’s a vegetable very annoying terrible physics nothing to do after 1 min don’t buy even though it was only £2 don’t waste ur money

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! While in Early Access we release a new and improved version each month and will adress the issues you brought up.

reviews.review_description: I’m rating it 5 stars considering it’s a game on early access. This game has a huge potential being a destruction simulator and I’m looking forward to see what it will become in the future.
Would love to have an actual shredder in real life but for now this will do

reviews.review_title: Who hasn't wanted to do this irl!
reviews.review_description: This is a very entertaining app/game. Who hasn't wanted to try various objects through a shredder. Very unique idea and well implemented. The creativity is great 👏

developer_response.body:
Congrats, you are the first user to leave us a review!
Thank you for playing and we hope you will return to it as we keep improving and upgrading the game with new objects to shred!

reviews.review_description: It's a fun little game. Hope there's more story and feature/object to shred. Please also add a free locomotion mode so it could he easier to move and grab things.

developer_response.body: Thank your for your feedback andreiiiiii! These are great suggestions and we will aim make them part of the next version!

reviews.review_description: Not sure what to make of this one, it’s fun and a great way of getting rid of pent up frustrations.  The physics feel great and the sound is brilliant as you shred the phones and the light tubes in fact anything you see seems to be ‘shredable’.  But I would like to move around with locomotion or have a long distance grab.  I don’t have a lot of play space so hope that will come soon.  I can’t wait to see where this one goes with future development.

developer_response.body: Hi, we are happy to announce the release of a new version of Shred (v 1.0.8) with thumbsticks free movement and turning + crouching. Now you can shred anywhere!

reviews.review_description: Super fun! I love the destruction. It is super satisfying. I definitely recommend it.

The games on early access but there is everything for this to have a bright future!As you can see the idea is unique....graphic is quite good ...and it can become something bigger than just shredding objects. If the developer will keep the game updated fixing bugs and adding more and more ....it can become a funny game. The price is really cheap so keeping in mind this is at early stage ...it's a kind of long term investment and it deserves 5 stars in my opinion

developer_response.body: Thank you for supporting our game! Keep an eye on the new release every month as we make our way out of Early Access!
